title: Meditation and the Wandering Mind: A Theoretical Framework of Underlying Neurocognitive Mechanisms.

assets.abstract: During the practice of meditation, the tendency of the mind to wander away from the object of focus is ubiquitous. The occurrence of mind wandering in the context of meditation provides individuals a unique and intimate opportunity to closely examine the nature of the wandering mind by cultivating an awareness of ongoing thought patterns, while simultaneously aiming to cultivate equanimity (evenness of temper or disposition) and compassion toward the content of thoughts, interpretations, and bod

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=6.0: links Ultimate/Emptiness concept to mechanistic neuroscience
